headline: PULL-UPS® DEBUTS LEARNING LAYER™ TECHNOLOGY, A NEW INNOVATION TO HELP KIDS LEARN THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN WET AND DRY
summary: Pull-Ups®, a trusted brand and leader in potty training for nearly four decades, is proud to introduce Learning Layer™ technology, a new innovation designed to support one of parenting's most unpredictable milestones.
